About Pablo

In a world overrun by fleeting meme coins, Pablo emerges from the shadows, tired of the hot potato game. The era of Pepe’s dominance fades as Pablo, the unmistakable Crypto Pablo, ascends to claim his throne. Say goodbye to the superficiality of memes; it’s time for a revolution led by $PABLO. This coin isn’t just a symbol; it’s a force of true utility and DeFi protocols. With the unbridled power of Crypto Pablo memetics, $PABLO embodies the Crypto Pablo Way, where utility, passive income, and a vibe that echoes through the underworld reign supreme. Join the ranks of those who dare to defy the meme madness, and let $PABLO be your guide to a new era of greatness in the world of crypto.

PABLO WHITEPAPER

Where to buy

HOW TO BUY

Step 1: Create a Wallet

Download metamask or your wallet of choice from the app store or google play store for free. Desktop users, download the google chrome extension by going to metamask.io.

Step 2: Get some ETH

Get ETH on your Metamask, transfer from another wallet, or buy on another exchange and send it to your ERC20 wallet address.

Step 3: Go to Uniswap

Go to Uniswap from your Metamask App's browser and connect your wallet. Paste the PABLO token address into Uniswap, and select the token.

Step 4: Switch ETH for $PABLO

Switch ETH for $PABLO. We have zero tax buy so you can buy $PABLO without getting taxed, if you want to sell $PABLO, you will pay a tax between 0% to 10% depending on various factors you will discover when you enter the Crypto Pablo market.

Welcome to 2024’s premier launchpad: where visionary projects meet unparalleled support. Join us for a journey of innovation and success in the crypto world.

Pablo, the Crypto Narco king, aims to replace meme coins with real utility and DeFi. Launching with presale, $PABLO offers utility, passive income, and Narcos vibes.

Pablonomics

Token Supply: 1 Billion

In $Pablo’s world, a unique ecosystem unfolds where Crypto Pablo associates enjoy tax-free transactions when acquiring $PABLO products. The tax rate, ranging from 0% to a maximum of 10%, is determined by Pablo’s mood and the protocol’s profitability for the cartel. Those deemed traitors, diverting profits to rival turfs, face the higher end of this spectrum. A percentage of tokens is allocated to presale and liquidity pools, with 5% reserved in a MULTI SIG wallet for future centralized exchange listings. Another 5% is set aside for the development team, subject to a 180-day lock. The remaining tokens find their way to bridges and liquidity pools, ensuring transparency in the allocation process. This financial underworld operates seamlessly, guided by the whims of $Pablo and the prosperity of the cartel.

Roadmap

Origin: Formation of the cartel
Rise: Cartel Take over
Glory: Conquer the world

Here it is a sketch of $PABLO path to take over the DeFi world and kill the meme shit coin farmers. Remember, when Pablo promises, he delivers it!

Origin
  • Build Telegram bot
  • Build Pablo Cartel
  • Build Auto Leverage trading
  • Token creation
  • Staking protocols

  • Token launch on Uniswap
  • 5k Holders
Rise
  • Integrating 2 additional auto bots
  • V2.0 Tele Pablo
  • List on 3 major CEXs
  • Defi Cross chain protocol
  • Pablo Mix
  • Marketing Push
  • Releasing NFT Collection
  • Community partnerships
  • 10k holders
Glory
  • Narcos Land THE GAME
    Pablo takes over
  • Pablo NFT party for members
  • Pablo merch
  • DeFi Protocol
  • Pablo Auto Pad
  • Crypto Pablo Land presenting new ecosystems
  • 100k Holders

Pablo Cartel

Tele Pablo
Tele Pablo revolutionizes cryptocurrency trading on Telegram for $PABLO holders. It offers real-time market data, seamless order execution, portfolio tracking, and algorithmic trading. Unique fee distribution rewards Stakers, fostering an engaged and rewarded community within the Pablo ecosystem.
Pablo leverage shooter

Pablo Leverage Shooter, a cutting-edge crypto leverage software, transforms leveraged cryptocurrency trading. Automating trades from 2x to 10x, it enhances efficiency and speed. Advanced risk management, real-time data response, and informed decision-making tools empower users, ensuring confident navigation of volatile crypto markets.

The Sniper Sicario

The Sniper Sicario, an advanced bot tailored for pre-sale sniping and fair launch engagement in cryptocurrency, offers users unprecedented control over investment strategy. Noteworthy for customizable selling points, it automates sniping, enhancing trade efficiency. Empowering users for strategic precision, it’s a vital tool for navigating the dynamic crypto market.

Revenue Sharing

Our commitment to transparency and community involvement is evident in our full revenue-sharing model. All DeFi protocol-generated income is distributed to two staking pools—one in $PABLO tokens, fostering shared success, and the other in USDT for stability. The team actively engages, aligning interests and promoting collective growth.

Unleash the power & expand your territory

Build your territory

Dive into Narcos Land, a thrilling play-to-own game set against the backdrop of Colombia and Mexico. Engage in fierce competition, navigate treacherous territories, and vie for supremacy with strategic moves and alliances. Claim valuable NFTs, control lucrative lands, and maneuver through the DOPE business’s complex networks. Every decision counts in this high-stakes war for dominance. Prepare for an intense journey of cunning strategy and power plays. Are you ready to conquer and become the top kingpin in Narcos Land? Join now!
